# CWE-1240 positive: homegrown XOR cipher (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1240-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1240: Use of a Cryptographic Primitive with a Risky Implementation.
// Vulnerable: custom XOR stream cipher protects session tokens.

import (
	"encoding/base64"
	"net/http"
)

func xorCipherPure(key byte, data []byte) []byte {
	out := make([]byte, len(data))
	for i, b := range data {
		out[i] = b ^ key
	}
	return out
}

func SealSessionTokenPure() http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if err := r.ParseForm(); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		token := r.FormValue("token")
		sealed := xorCipherPure(0x5A, []byte(token))
		encoded := base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(sealed)
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`{"sealed":"` + encoded + `"}`))
	}
}
